title: Calonemorchis phaeoclavia
taxonomy: Calonemorchis phaeoclavia is classified as a species within the genus Calonemorchis, which belongs to the family Orchidaceae. This genus is a group of orchids endemic to Australia. The Orchidaceae family is the largest plant family, comprising over 30,000 species worldwide. Calonemorchis phaeoclavia is a terrestrial orchid, meaning it grows on the ground rather than in the air or on other plants.
